note: Whitelist of Confederation conscious-channeling references the Ask feature may cite with {{QCITE:id}} markers. Ids are YYYY-MMDD (optionally _NN for same-day sessions, mirroring llresearch.org's own URL suffixes). The path is authoritative — never derive URLs from the id. Every entry's date, path, and source entity have been verified against the live transcript (scripts/validate-channeling-citations.ts --online).

1974-0415.note: Hatonn: the intellect a fixed rock watching the waves, become the water

1979-0719.note: Latwii: whole civilizations within a single cell, the circular wheel of time

1989-1231.note: the higher self as your own essence across time, quieting to hear the still small voice

1990-0121.note: mates as mutual mirrors, accepting relational antagonism as catalyst

2000-0923.note: pilgrims not experts, admitting they do not know the cosmic design
